subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim is skeptical that anything bad will happen at the cave location.
source_quote: Why would anything have happened? We this was a totally safe location.

subject: The party
fact: The party is skeptical of Bramgrim's suggestion due to his previous questionable decisions while under the influence of madness.
source_quote: his companions were skeptical given his previous questionable decisions while under the influence of madness

subject: The party
fact: The party feels paranoia about potential attacks.
source_quote: Despite their paranoia about potential attacks

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim feels smug after the party rests safely.
source_quote: Bramgrim smugly reminded them that not everything in the Underdark was out to get them

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan initially accuses the party of working with their captor.
source_quote: Teegan initially accused the party of working with their captor, Maram il Vass

subject: The party
fact: The party recognizes the demons as not particularly intelligent or lethal.
source_quote: The party recognizes the demons as not particularly intelligent or lethal

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan screams in fright, hindering the situation.
source_quote: Teegan screams in fright, hindering the situation

subject: Daein
fact: Daein suffers psychic damage and disadvantage on attack rolls from the Phantasmal Killer spell.
source_quote: causing psychic damage and imposing disadvantage on his attack rolls

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan suspects Maram il Vass is more than a half-elf.
source_quote: whom she suspects is more than a half-elf

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan feels relieved and trusting after the demons are defeated.
source_quote: Teegan, now relieved and trusting

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considers infusing his armor with a +2 bonus.
source_quote: Felkur considers infusing armor with a +2 bonus

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur decides to infuse his own armor for 17 AC.
source_quote: decides to infuse his own armor for 17 AC

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas considers new spells like Silence.
source_quote: considers new spells like Silence

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours.
source_quote: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours

subject: The party
fact: The party decides to save True Seeing for when they are in the presence of Maram il Vass.
source_quote: They decide to save True Seeing for when they are in the presence of Maram il Vass

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan refuses to follow the party further into the palace.
source_quote: Teegan and Drystan refuse to follow the party further

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan refuses to follow the party further into the palace.
source_quote: Teegan and Drystan refuse to follow the party further

subject: Daein
fact: Daein learns that negotiation is often preferred over bluffing when approaching such creatures.
source_quote: learning that negotiation is often preferred over bluffing

subject: The party
fact: The party acts as if they have legitimate business to speak to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: acting as if they have legitimate business

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass speaks of the endless blood war.
source_quote: Maram il Vass, now revealed, speaks of the 'endless blood war'

subject: The party
fact: The party vehemently refuses the trade of Felkur.
source_quote: The party rejects the trade of Felkur, with Bramgrim vehemently refusing

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim vehemently refuses the trade of Felkur.
source_quote: with Bramgrim vehemently refusing

subject: The party
fact: The party finds the offer to trade Bramgrim unfair.
source_quote: but the party still finds the offer unfair

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass treats the prisoner Xaven Tanor'this with what he calls 'hospitality'.
source_quote: treated with what he called 'hospitality'

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to let the party use his side office for privacy.
source_quote: Maram reluctantly agreed to let them use his side office

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass presents a contract for the privacy agreement.
source_quote: Maram il Vass presents a contract for their privacy agreement

subject: The party
fact: The party scrutinizes the contract for loopholes.
source_quote: which the party scrutinizes for loopholes

subject: The party
fact: The party negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations.
source_quote: The party negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations

subject: The party
fact: The party feels they are deep in the devil's den, surrounded by forces far beyond their immediate perception.
source_quote: a reminder that they were deep in the devil's den, surrounded by forces far beyond their immediate perception

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan drove a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape the torment.
source_quote: he had driven a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape the torment

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan shoved a pointed stick into both of his ears due to his mental breakdown from torture.
source_quote: shoved a pointed stick into both of his ears due to his mental breakdown from torture

subject: Bramgrim
fact: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass

fact: Bramgrim vehemently refused the trade of Felkur.

subject: Drystan

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is unable to communicate.
